description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a geometric, angular layout. The exterior features a combination of horizontal gray siding and natural wood paneling, with large windows providing ample natural light. The property includes a grassy yard with two mature trees, a wooden swing set, and a small garden bench, suggesting a family-friendly environment. Skylights are visible on the roof, enhancing interior illumination. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped and others standing alone, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor integration.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with gray siding, wood accents, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring trees and a swing set.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, wood paneling, a large window, and a swing set with trees and a bench in the yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angular layout, a prominent window, the swing set, and a tree near the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displays large sliding glass doors, skylights, and a clear view of the flat roof and open yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals more windows, the swing set, and the geometric connection between the two main sections of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
